nico's guide ♡

a guide made with dani's vibes ✦
hey, nico.
have a safe trip to my favourite part of the world, asia!
"i made this little thing as a small guide for you, places to go, what to eat, and a few spots you can visit. maybe you'll think of me when you're there. upload photos when something feels worth keeping, and maybe a postcard too.

— dani ♡"
singapore.
okay so bali is a whole vibe. i've been a few times and every time i leave wanting to go back immediately.

canggu is where most of the spots below are — it's the coolest area, really good café scene and just generally a lovely place to walk around. the spa (ame) is genuinely one of the best massages i've had, and the cafés are all spots i've been to myself.

you can download all the locations below to google maps. have the best time ♡
cafés & spots
places to visit
here are a few little recommendations for singapore. i know you only have a short stopover, but hopefully you can visit a few. i uploaded some photos i took myself in some of the locations hehe.

if you want the real singapore experience, eat at the hawker centres. if you're craving something sweet, check out my favourite gelato spot or one of the traditional cafés.

gardens by the bay and marina bay sands are a must though… did you even really go to singapore if you didn't see those iconic spots haha.

you can also download all the locations at the bottom of the page to google maps and save them as bookmarks so it's easy to find everything.
